_how_to_use: Copy this file to google-input.json, then paste the business's public Google Business Profile info below. Blank fields fall back to industry-aware defaults. Run: npm run import:google
name: Volt & Bolt Electric

reviews.author: Sam P.
reviews.body: Fast, tidy, and fairly priced panel upgrade. Explained everything clearly.

reviews.author: Dana L.
reviews.body: Installed our EV charger same week. Professional from quote to cleanup.
